column.name: ERDAT
column.description: Date on which the object was created

column.name: ERNAM
column.description: Name of User Who Created the Object

column.name: AEDAT
column.description: Date on which the object was last changed

column.name: AENAM
column.description: Name of the user who last changed the object

column.name: DATAB
column.description: Start-Up Date of the Technical Object

column.name: PSTAE
column.description: SAP Development reserve: Format CHAR, length 4

column.name: STNAM
column.description: SAP Development Reserve: Format CHAR, Length 12

column.name: LVORM
column.description: SAP Development Reserve: Format CHAR, Length 1

column.name: SUBMT
column.description: Construction type material of the object

column.name: SUBMTI
column.description: Data origin for construction type field

column.name: MAPARI
column.description: SAP Development Reserve: Format CHAR, Length 1

column.name: IEQUI
column.description: Installation of equipment allowed at the functional location

column.name: IEQUII
column.description: Data origin for equip. inst. allowed field

column.name: EINZL
column.description: Single equipment installation at functional location

column.name: EINZLI
column.description: Data origin for authorization group field

column.name: IWERKI
column.description: Data origin for planning plant field

column.name: INGRP
column.description: Planner Group for Customer Service and Plant Maintenance

column.name: INGRPI
column.description: Data origin for maintenance planner group field

column.name: PM_OBJTY
column.description: Object Type of CIM Resources for Work Center

column.name: LGWID
column.description: Object ID of the Work Center

column.name: LGWIDI
column.description: Data Origin for the Field 'Work Center'

column.name: RBNR_I
column.description: Data origin for maintenance catalog field

column.name: ILOAN
column.description: Location and account assignment for technical object

column.name: EMATN
column.description: Material number corresponding to manufacturer part number

column.name: HANDLE
column.description: SAP Development Reserve: Integration of Date Segment (Key)

column.name: TSEGTP
column.description: SAP Development Reserve: Integration Date Segment (Tempate)

column.name: ENDOFUSE
column.description: End-of-Use Date of the Technical Object

column.name: IFLOT_SNTYPE
column.description: Notification Type for Shift Note for Object
